title: Surgeons Must Be Very Careful
content:
Surgeons must be very careful
    When they take the knife!
    Underneath their fine incisions
    Stirs the culprit, -- Life!
meaning:
"Surgeons Must Be Very Careful" is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
